title: Legacy Console Edition Enchantment Glint
description: This resourcepack replaces glint texture with the old one from Console Legacy Edition and Minecraft Java Beta. This results in the glint being white, like on the old Console Edition.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/uDKHujIx?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1339291?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/uDKHujIx?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
# About project This resourcepack replaces the glint texture with the old grayscale one from `Minecraft: Java Ed. Beta` and `Legacy Console Edition`. It's supposed to simulate the look from the Legacy Console Edition, but I couldn't make the effect blocky like back then without creating a sophisticated mod that would change how glint works entirely. That's why this resourcepack just changes the texture and blurrs it on 1.21.5+. ## Future support I plan on updating this project every time there is a new release of Minecraft to keep it working on the most recent versions. ### Originally requested by: korbyntalks
